positive: A mystical, celestial portrait of a stylized winged lion, rampant and majestically posed, set against a deeply saturated gradient background of cosmic nebula and stardust. The lion should have sharp, clean contours and powerful, dynamic musculature. Incorporate intricate filigree and mandalic patterns radiating from its wings and mane. Use a palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, vibrant teal, and cosmic violet. The composition must be centrally balanced, allowing for clean cropping on apparel. Style: Neo-tribal mystic vector art combined with detailed Art Nouveau linework. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the silhouette. Vector illustration, highly detailed, solid color fields with gradients, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low quality, artifacts, blurred, grain, noise, text, signature, logo, watermark, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, disfigured, messy background
